subcodes.first_line: Your book hath reached the presence of the Wronged One, and from it have We perceived the fragrance of thy turning and devotion unto God, the Lord of all worlds. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم و وجدنا منه عرف توجهک و اقبالک الی الله رب العالمین طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
